originalTitle: Live RL dev on Pufferlib w/ Joseph Suarez
title: Debugging Tiny Grad Variable Kernels and Puffer Multi-Threaded Vectorization
summary: Attempted to generate variable-sized fused kernels using Tiny Grad, encountering shape evaluation errors. Later debugged a multi-threaded C++ vectorization backend with GPU synchronization, identifying a buffer completion counter design to fix ordering issues.
